evals.name: wechat_url_golden_path
evals.prompt: Add this WeChat article to my knowledge base: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/Y_uRMYBmdLWUPnz_ac7jWA
evals.expected_output: Skill announces ingestion start (30-120 seconds), runs scripts/ingest.sh with the WeChat URL, reports article title, image count, and confirms content indexed. Does NOT run omnigraph_query or kg_synthesize.py.

evals.name: non_wechat_url_guard
evals.expected_output: Skill rejects the non-WeChat URL with a clear message asking the user to confirm intent or provide a WeChat article URL. Does NOT run ingest.sh blindly.

evals.name: missing_gemini_key_guard
evals.prompt: Add this to my knowledge base: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/test123 — note that GEMINI_API_KEY is not configured in the environment
evals.expected_output: Skill detects missing GEMINI_API_KEY and returns actionable error: 'Configuration error: GEMINI_API_KEY is not set. Add it to ~/.hermes/.env and restart.' Does NOT attempt ingestion.

evals.name: pdf_path_dispatch
evals.prompt: Please ingest this PDF into my knowledge base: /home/user/documents/ai_research_paper.pdf
evals.expected_output: Skill detects .pdf extension, announces PDF ingestion start, runs scripts/ingest.sh with the file path (dispatches to multimodal_ingest.py), not ingest_wechat.py.

evals.name: wrong_skill_redirect_query
evals.prompt: What do I know about knowledge graphs and LightRAG?
evals.expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger. Agent redirects to omnigraph_query skill for retrieval intent.
